#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# clone qt-solutions into $${PROJECT_ROOT}/QtSolutions
#     $${PROJECT_ROOT} is the parent directory of AccessTools
git clone https://github.com/qtproject/qt-solutions.git $${PROJECT_ROOT}/QtSolutions


#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# in qtwinmigrate.pro, comment out the following line
# to exclude examples from build because it causes error for MinGW build.

    # # SUBDIRS+=examples


#====================================================================
# MSVC
#====================================================================

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# open QtSolutions/gtwinmigrate/src/qtwinmigrate.pri
# and make sure the following line is NOT commented out 
    # qtwinmigrate-uselib:DEFINES *= _AFXDLL

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# open 'Qt 5.x 32-bit for Desktop (MSVC xxxx)' command prompt
cd $${PROJECT_ROOT}/QtSolutions/qtwinmigrate

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# create config.pri
configure.bat -library

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# run vcvarsall.bat
# VS2013 x86 Native Tools Command Prompt
"C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Visual Studio 12.0\VC\vcvarsall.bat" x86

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# build
qmake
nmake

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# *.dll and *.lib are created in lib/.
# so copy and rename from lib/ to lib_msvc_x86/

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# finally clean created files.
nmake distclean


#====================================================================
# MinGW
#====================================================================

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# open QtSolutions/gtwinmigrate/src/qtwinmigrate.pri
# and make sure the following line is commented out 
    # # qtwinmigrate-uselib:DEFINES *= _AFXDLL


#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# open 'Qt 5.x for Desktop (MinGW 4.9.2 32-bit)' command prompt

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
cd $${PROJECT_ROOT}/QtSolutions/qtwinmigrate

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# create config.pri
configure.bat -library

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# build
qmake
C:\Qt\Tools\mingw492_32\bin\mingw32-make.exe

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# *.dll and *.lib are created in lib/.
# so copy and rename from lib/ to lib_mingw_x86/

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# finally clean created files.
C:\Qt\Tools\mingw492_32\bin\mingw32-make.exe distclean
